name: get_inventory
description: Query inventory with various filters including product ID, name, category, stock status, and low stock alerts. Returns detailed product information including quantities, stock status, and reorder thresholds.

product_name.description: Filter by product name (partial match supported)

category.description: Filter by product category (headphones, watch, speaker, computer, phone)

in_stock.description: Filter by stock availability (true for in stock, false for out of stock)

low_stock.description: Show items below reorder threshold (true for low stock items)

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default 50, max 100)

name: get_inventory_summary
description: Get a summary of inventory grouped by category. Shows total items and in-stock items for each product category.
